title: Rattle Document Template (Offer / Quote / Custom / CCMS)
description: Output of the rattle-document-templates workflow. Describes a document template with chapters and attachments. Honours the doc_type contract from GET /documents/doc-types. For technical documentations (doc_type=technical_doc) use the dedicated rattle-techdoc skill instead — it emits a richer 15-chapter scaffold against the same template surface.

doc_type.description: Must match an entry from app/services/document_types.py: 'offer', 'quote', 'custom', or 'ccms' (legacy plurals 'offers'/'quotes' are also accepted on writes). 'technical_doc' is intentionally excluded here — that doc_type uses the techdoc-template schema in skills/rattle-techdoc/. The string 'datasheet' is NOT a backend doc_type; datasheet-style assets ride on 'custom'.

slug.description: Unique within the template. Lowercase kebab-case.

content_block_id.description: Existing content block id. Resolve system dynamic blocks by paginating GET /documents/content-blocks?search=dynamic: and matching the response's is_dynamic=true && key='dynamic:<name>' entry — the route does NOT honour ?is_dynamic= as a query param.

dynamic_key.description: Convenience: 'dynamic:document_configuration' etc. The builder resolves this to a content_block_id at execution time.

content_block_proposal.description: Used only when proposing a NEW static content block (not a wrapper around a dynamic key — that violates use-system-dynamic-blocks).
